topIngredients.name: Niacinamide
topIngredients.benefit: Controls oil production and minimizes pores while cleansing

topIngredients.name: Thermal Spring Water
topIngredients.benefit: La Roche-Posay's signature soothing water for sensitive skin

verdict: La Roche-Posay Toleriane Purifying Cleanser is the gold standard for acne-prone and sensitive skin. The niacinamide base controls sebum without triggering irritation or breakouts.
